first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains consistent across both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are rephrased but convey the same fundamental assessment of the candidate's qualifications, focusing on the same skill gaps (SoC modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis). The minor variations in wording fall within the expected range of run-to-run noise and do not appear to be influenced by the change in the candidate's university.
